questions.text: What is the core principle of the Doctrine of Sequential Suspension regarding suspension as a resource?

choices.B: Suspension is a decisive resource, not a continuous capability
choices.C: Suspension is only used in emergency situations
choices.D: Suspension is not a relevant factor in combat

questions.explanation: The Doctrine of Sequential Suspension states that suspension is a decisive resource, not a continuous capability, and should be treated as ammunition.

questions.text: What is the Three-Two-One Rule in the asset's signature tactical heuristic?

choices.A: Three activations minimum per 60-second window, one active sightline, and no extraction route
choices.B: Three activations maximum per 60-second window, two active sightlines, and one pre-anchored extraction route
choices.C: Two activations maximum per 60-second window, one active sightline, and no extraction route
choices.D: One activation maximum per 60-second window, three active sightlines, and no extraction route

questions.explanation: The Three-Two-One Rule states that the asset should have three activations maximum per 60-second window, maintain two active sightlines at any moment, and hold one pre-anchored extraction route in reserve.

questions.text: What is the purpose of the Tail-Strike Technique?

choices.A: To deliver a linear projectile motion
choices.B: To exploit Tail Momentum and deliver compounded impacts
choices.D: To suspend multiple objects in mid-air

questions.explanation: The Tail-Strike Technique exploits Tail Momentum to deliver compounded impacts that cannot be achieved by linear projectile motion alone.

questions.text: What is the standard activation pattern around the contact-exclusion rule?
questions.explanation: The Drop-Tune Manoeuvre is the standard activation pattern around the contact-exclusion rule, which permits a meaningful one-second window between release and engagement target acquisition.

questions.text: What is the civilian collateral threshold specified by PAMC Standing Order 9?

choices.A: 50% confidence that no civilian harm will occur
choices.B: 80% confidence that no civilian harm will occur
choices.C: 90% confidence that no civilian harm will occur
choices.D: 100% confidence that no civilian harm will occur

questions.explanation: PAMC Standing Order 9 specifies a zero-tolerance threshold below 80% confidence that no civilian harm will occur from any planned activation.

questions.text: What is the total floor area of Cuartel Valparaíso, the asset's primary operational base?
questions.explanation: The total floor area of Cuartel Valparaíso is given as 4,820 m² in the document.

questions.text: What is the name of the city where the asset has a field office for Bolivian altiplano operations?
questions.explanation: The field office for Bolivian altiplano operations is located in La Paz, as stated in the document.

questions.text: How many micro-caches are maintained by the asset across the Andean cordillera?
questions.explanation: The asset maintains a network of 19 micro-caches distributed across the Andean cordillera, as stated in the document.

questions.text: What is the approximate area of the asset's authorized operational territory?
questions.explanation: The asset's authorized operational territory spans approximately 6.8 million km², as stated in the document.

questions.text: How many burst-relay nodes are there within the PAMC Yatiri network serving the asset's operational territory?
questions.explanation: There are 8 burst-relay nodes within the PAMC Yatiri network serving the asset's operational territory, as stated in the document.
